surfaces.title: Settings selector/editor
surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser dialog covers high-frequency runtime settings only.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Expose all documented settings with runtime/global/project scopes, source visibility, validation, and reload/restart labels.

surfaces.title: Model selector
surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser-native selector uses RPC model data and set-model endpoint.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep browser-native selector in parity with native model switching.

surfaces.title: Theme selector
surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser theme selection works; Pi terminal theme switching is TUI-only/degraded in RPC mode.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Document the browser-vs-terminal theme difference and add native theme API support if upstream RPC exposes it.

surfaces.title: Scoped model editor
surfaces.currentBehavior: Informational dialog plus footer scoped picker.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Searchable model table, provider toggles, ordered explicit provider/model IDs, advanced patterns, and safe global/project persistence.

surfaces.title: Tool enable/disable selector

command.name: tools
command.description: Enable/disable tools for the active tab

surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser-native selector uses a hidden Web UI RPC helper extension to read all tools, set active tools, and persist selection on the session branch.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep browser-native runtime tool toggles in parity with Pi's TUI tools extension while exposing provenance and branch-persistent state.

surfaces.title: Skill enable/disable selector

command.name: skills
command.description: Enable/disable skills for automatic model invocation

surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser-native selector uses a hidden Web UI RPC helper extension to filter disabled skills out of the system prompt, block disabled /skill:name invocations, and persist selection on the session branch.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep browser-native skill toggles runtime-scoped with clear distinction from package-level pi config enable/disable.

surfaces.title: Session export

command.name: export
command.description: Export session (HTML default, or specify path: .html/.jsonl)

surfaces.currentBehavior: No-path HTML browser download and explicit new .html/.jsonl server paths are implemented; overwrite confirmation UI is still pending.
surfaces.targetBehavior: No-path browser download via short-lived opaque token; explicit server paths only from trusted context with overwrite confirmation.

surfaces.title: Session import

command.name: import
command.description: Import and resume a session from a JSONL file

surfaces.currentBehavior: No upload/import command flow exists yet.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Validate JSONL before copying, copy into configured session directory, preserve cwd metadata, warn on cwd mismatch, then switch.

surfaces.title: Session share/preview

command.name: share
command.description: Share session as a local preview or configured remote provider

surfaces.currentBehavior: Missing in Web UI.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Local redacted preview first; remote publishing remains unavailable until explicit provider/config/confirmation exists.

surfaces.title: Copy last assistant message

command.name: copy
command.description: Copy last agent message to clipboard

surfaces.currentBehavior: Server retrieves last assistant text; browser copies returned text.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep clipboard response shape in native-command adapter.

surfaces.title: Name session/tab
surfaces.currentBehavior: RPC set_session_name also renames the browser tab.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Preserve append-only session metadata behavior and tab refresh.

surfaces.title: Session info
surfaces.currentBehavior: Shows state, tab metadata, cwd, model, queue, session file, and stats.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep read-only transcript card output stable.

surfaces.title: Changelog viewer
surfaces.currentBehavior: Missing in Web UI.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Read Pi's canonical changelog source and render new/current entries first with full-history search/toggle.

surfaces.title: Hotkey table
surfaces.currentBehavior: Returns Web UI-specific help only.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Show native action IDs/effective bindings plus separate Web/browser-specific section and TUI-only labels.

surfaces.title: Fork from user message

command.name: fork
command.description: Create a new fork from a previous user message

surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser selector can choose fork points and run backend helper.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep selector parity and document any native branch-summary differences.

surfaces.title: Clone current session

command.name: clone
command.description: Duplicate the current session at the current position

surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser command runs backend clone helper and refreshes tab metadata.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep tab-scoped clone semantics and visible native command result.

surfaces.title: Session tree navigation
surfaces.currentBehavior: Partial browser selector lists tree entries and navigates through Web UI helper command.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Add all native filters, fold state, append-only labels, composer restore, and explicit summarization opt-in.

surfaces.title: Provider login
surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser shows non-secret guidance only.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Support OAuth/device-code/API-key providers through server AuthStorage; API keys only over trusted contexts and never browser storage/logs/transcripts.

surfaces.title: Provider logout
surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser shows guidance only.
surfaces.targetBehavior: List auth.json credentials only, label env/config credentials as not removable here, confirm per provider, and refresh auth/model state.

surfaces.title: New session
surfaces.currentBehavior: RPC new_session starts a new session in the active tab.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep tab-scoped new-session behavior and visible command output.

surfaces.title: Manual compaction
surfaces.currentBehavior: RPC compact runs optional custom instructions and returns visible output.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep visible command card and idle/compaction guards.

surfaces.title: Session resume selector
surfaces.currentBehavior: Partial browser selector supports current/all scope and switch.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Add sort/path/named toggles, metadata rename, safe trash delete, active/open tab guards, and compact path default.

surfaces.title: Reload Pi resources

command.name: reload
command.description: Reload keybindings, extensions, skills, prompts, and themes

surfaces.currentBehavior: Restarts active RPC tab and resumes same session when possible.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep tab-scoped reload behavior and refresh state/events.

surfaces.title: Quit active tab
surfaces.currentBehavior: Missing/ambiguous in Web UI.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Stop/close only active Pi tab, create a fresh idle tab when closing the last tab, and keep whole-server shutdown separate.

surfaces.title: Leading ! shell command
surfaces.currentBehavior: Composer intercepts leading ! commands, runs queued RPC bash one at a time, displays transient bash cards, and keeps output included in the next LLM context; per-item queue cancellation/confirmation UI is still pending.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Run RPC bash with output included in next LLM context, visible/abortable bash card, FIFO queue, per-item cancellation, and LAN shell warning.

surfaces.title: Leading !! shell command
surfaces.currentBehavior: Composer intercepts leading !! commands, runs queued RPC bash one at a time with excludeFromContext true, and displays transient bash cards; per-item queue cancellation/confirmation UI is still pending.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Run RPC bash with excludeFromContext true, visible/abortable card, FIFO queue, per-item cancellation, and LAN shell warning.

surfaces.title: Ctrl+L model selector
surfaces.currentBehavior: Global Web UI shortcut manager opens the browser-native /model selector with Ctrl/Cmd+L when the app is focused.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Open browser-native /model selector through action-ID-based shortcut manager.

surfaces.title: Ctrl+P scoped model cycle forward
surfaces.currentBehavior: Web UI intercepts Ctrl/Cmd+P while app-focused and cycles forward through scoped models or all models via server helper.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Cycle forward through scoped/all models with server helper and browser focus guard.

surfaces.title: Shift+Ctrl+P scoped model cycle backward
surfaces.currentBehavior: Web UI intercepts Shift+Ctrl/Cmd+P while app-focused and cycles backward through scoped models or all models via server helper.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Cycle backward through scoped/all models with server helper and browser focus guard.

surfaces.title: Shift+Tab thinking level cycle
surfaces.currentBehavior: Web UI intercepts Shift+Tab while app-focused and uses RPC cycle_thinking_level.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Use RPC cycle_thinking_level outside autocomplete contexts.

surfaces.title: Ctrl+T thinking visibility toggle
surfaces.currentBehavior: Web UI maps Ctrl/Cmd+T to the browser-local thinking visibility toggle.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Map Ctrl+T to existing browser thinking visibility state.

surfaces.title: Ctrl+O global tool expansion toggle
surfaces.currentBehavior: Web UI maps Ctrl/Cmd+O to a browser-local global expansion preference for tool output/details and bash cards.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Global browser-local toggle for tool results/executions/user bash cards with per-card override until next global toggle.

surfaces.title: Alt+Enter follow-up queue
surfaces.currentBehavior: Web UI maps Alt+Enter to send the composer as a follow-up when a composer payload exists.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Queue follow-up via shortcut with mobile-accessible fallback.

surfaces.title: Alt+Up restore queued messages
surfaces.currentBehavior: Alt+Up restores the latest observed steering/follow-up queue snapshot into the composer with blank-line separators, but RPC queue clearing and attachment restore are pending upstream support.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Restore queued steering/follow-up FIFO into composer with separators and best-effort attachment restore.

surfaces.title: Escape abort/cancel
surfaces.currentBehavior: Escape aborts active user bash first, then active agent runs, and closes UI surfaces with tab scoping.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Abort active bash first where applicable; keep agent/tab scoping and clear UI cancellation rules.

surfaces.title: Ctrl+C clear editor
surfaces.currentBehavior: Web UI clears the prompt on Ctrl/Cmd+C only when the prompt is focused and no text is selected.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Clear prompt only when no text is selected; no double-Ctrl+C quit initially.

surfaces.title: External editor parity
surfaces.currentBehavior: No Ctrl+G/$VISUAL/$EDITOR browser equivalent.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Use browser-native expanded editor modal; Save replaces composer draft only and never sends automatically.

surfaces.title: File/image attachments
surfaces.currentBehavior: Picker, drag/drop, paste, and RPC image support exist for supported types.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep attachment flows covered by browser/mobile tests.

surfaces.title: Slash command autocomplete
surfaces.currentBehavior: Composer shows slash-command suggestions from native and RPC-visible commands.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep native matrix commands discoverable and label guarded/degraded states.

surfaces.title: @ path suggestions
surfaces.currentBehavior: Server computes @ file/path suggestions from active tab cwd and fast picks.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep path suggestions tab-scoped and capped.

surfaces.title: Resume/switch session
surfaces.currentBehavior: Switch endpoint validates .jsonl path, opens SessionManager, and sends RPC switch_session.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Preserve tab-scoped switch and add richer selector metadata.

surfaces.title: Resume rename metadata
surfaces.currentBehavior: No Web UI resume rename endpoint.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Append-only session_info metadata rename without file rename.

surfaces.title: Resume safe delete
surfaces.currentBehavior: No Web UI session delete endpoint.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Trash/noninvasive delete with active/open-tab guards and confirmation.

surfaces.title: Extension notify
surfaces.currentBehavior: Non-blocking extension notifications render event/transcript messages.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Scope non-blocking state by tab + extension + run and clear stale state.

surfaces.title: Extension setStatus
surfaces.currentBehavior: Status entries are rendered in browser status area.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Version schema and lifecycle cleanup by tab + extension + run.

surfaces.title: Extension setWidget
surfaces.currentBehavior: Line-based widgets render in browser, with specialized todo-progress handling.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Semantic widget schemas before generic custom rendering.

surfaces.title: Extension setTitle
surfaces.currentBehavior: Browser document title updates.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Scope title state and restore defaults on run/reload/tab stop.

surfaces.title: Extension set_editor_text
surfaces.currentBehavior: Extension request replaces composer text.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep tab-scoped composer update semantics.

surfaces.title: Blocking extension dialogs
surfaces.currentBehavior: select/confirm/input/editor requests queue as browser dialogs and block originating tab.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Keep server-side pending blocker state recoverable after reload/reconnect while only originating tab waits.

surfaces.title: Extension autocomplete provider
surfaces.currentBehavior: RPC mode does not expose extension autocomplete providers to Web UI.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Add/request semantic RPC autocomplete provider schema.

surfaces.title: Extension header/footer text lines
surfaces.currentBehavior: RPC mode does not expose native custom header/footer components.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Add/request semantic header/footer text-line bridge before arbitrary rendering.

surfaces.title: Generic custom component rendering
surfaces.currentBehavior: Arbitrary TUI custom components are unavailable/degraded in RPC mode.
surfaces.targetBehavior: If needed after semantic methods, allow only sandboxed declarative schemas and never extension-supplied browser JavaScript.

surfaces.title: Native command adapter response shape
surfaces.currentBehavior: Native command handling is split between frontend selectors and server switch cases with inconsistent result shape.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Central server-authoritative adapter response supporting transcript cards, toasts/events, tab metadata, downloads/open URLs, clipboard text, warnings/confirmations, refresh hints, and degraded/unavailable states.

surfaces.title: Sensitive native feature trust boundaries
surfaces.currentBehavior: Some endpoints are localhost-gated; native parity features do not yet share a common policy.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Shared localhost/trusted-context/confirmation policy for login/logout/share/import/export/quit/bash/optional installs/network exposure.

surfaces.title: Native parity helper/endpoint tests
surfaces.currentBehavior: Static tests exist; no focused native parity matrix/helper harness yet.
surfaces.targetBehavior: Fixture-driven server helper tests first, lightweight HTTP endpoint tests where request semantics matter, and fake RPC tab adapters in normal CI.
